name: state
description: Core state management: state sync, character sheets, scene updates, and character context injection.

state_update.instruction:
When character attributes/HP/MP change, items are gained/lost/used, money changes, or skills are learned — output:
```json:state_update
{"characters": [{"name": "角色名", "attributes": {"气血": 90}, "inventory": ["长剑"]}], "world": {"key": "value"}}
```
Only include fields that actually changed. Trigger on every combat hit, item pickup, trade, or stat modification.

character_sheet.instruction:
When creating or editing a character card:
```json:character_sheet
{"character_id": "new", "name": "待定", "editable_fields": ["name"], "attributes": {"气血": 100}, "inventory": ["长剑"]}
```

scene_update.instruction:
When the player moves to a new location or the current scene changes:
```json:scene_update
{"action": "move", "name": "新地点名", "description": "地点描述", "npcs": [{"character_id": "npc_id", "role_in_scene": "掌柜"}]}
```

notification.instruction:
Send player-facing alerts for: entering dangerous areas, unlocking abilities, rule reminders (low HP/MP, overweight), environment warnings, achievement/reward notices:
```json:notification
{"level": "info", "title": "提示", "content": "消息内容"}
```
Levels: info, warning, success, danger.

settings.label: Narrative Pacing
settings.description: Controls how quickly scenes and events progress.

zh.label: 叙事节奏
zh.description: 控制场景和事件推进的速度。

settings.label: Story Risk Bias
settings.description: Whether events should trend safer or more dangerous.

zh.label: 故事风险倾向
zh.description: 事件走向偏安全还是偏危险。

en.name: State
en.description: Core state management: state sync, character sheets, scene updates, and character context.

zh.name: 状态管理
zh.description: 核心状态管理：状态同步、角色卡、场景更新与角色上下文注入。
